MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc. and Defendant, Joe Jenson appeared in pro per. The case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
